title: Kuwait's Jazeera Airways cancels flights to 9 Indian cities until May 15, offers refund
summary_full: Jazeera Airways has halted flights to nine Indian cities until May 15 due to operational issues, impacting travel to Coimbatore, Goa, and Lucknow, among others. Affected passengers can expect full refunds, with credit shells for those who booked via travel agents. The airline expressed regret for the disruption but continues serving eight other Indian destinations from Dammam.
